title: duggena mollis
intro: Duggena mollis, commonly known as Indian spikenard or Valerianaceae, is a plant species native to the Indian subcontinent. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, due to its impressive health benefits. The therapeutic actions of Duggena mollis include its sedative, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe the nervous system, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. The bioactive constituents present in this plant include valerenic acid, isovaleric acid, and valepotriates, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
